news.headline: Dogecoin Cash ($CBDS) expands into meme coin market by forming MEME COINS Inc. to capitalize on the growing cultural and financial phenomena, targeting acquisitions and partnerships. Strategic vision focuses on preserving equity for CBDS shareholders while venturing into the meme coin space that generates billions of dollars daily. MEME COINS Inc. aims to acquire established meme coins like Dogecoin and issue preferred shares to raise funds, ensuring minimal dilution for CBDS shareholders. The company plans to develop proprietary meme coins, engage with influencers, and build a community-oriented ecosystem to sustainably grow in the meme coin market.
news.summary: Dogecoin Cash, Inc. ($CBDS) is expanding into the meme coin market by creating a subsidiary, MEME COINS Inc., due to the success and popularity of meme coins. The meme coin market sees billions of dollars traded daily and offers unique opportunities for innovation and investor engagement. $CBDS aims to capitalize on this market while protecting shareholder equity by acquiring established meme coins, issuing preferred shares instead of common stock, and forming strategic partnerships and investments. The company plans to develop proprietary meme coins, collaborate with influencers, and build a community-first ecosystem to drive growth and sustainability in the meme coin market. By focusing on transparency, security, and scalability, $CBDS hopes to redefine the perception and usage of meme coins. Investors and developers are encouraged to join in this venture through MEME COINS Inc. for minimal dilution and maximum benefit in the rapidly growing meme coin market.

news.headline: Study at CRT 2025 shows EggNest outperforms Rampart Defender in room protection. EggNest offers better scatter radiation protection.
news.summary: A research study was presented on March 10, 2025, at the CRT 2025 meeting in Washington, DC, revealing that the EggNest Complete Radiation Protection System offers excellent scatter radiation protection. This system is designed to provide safety during procedures involving radiation exposure. The study highlighted the system's effectiveness in reducing scatter radiation by X% compared to traditional methods, emphasizing its superior performance in safeguarding healthcare professionals. This innovation aims to enhance safety in medical settings where radiation exposure is a concern.

news.headline: Quvia launches Q: AI tools for productivity in aviation & maritime sectors. Offers insights through natural language queries.
news.summary: A company based in Miramar, Florida, Quvia, previously known as Neuron, unveiled its latest AI-powered platform called Q. This suite includes embedded AI tools aimed at enhancing productivity and efficiency for connectivity, digital operations, and customer experience teams within the aviation, maritime, and enterprise industries. Customers now have the ability to utilize natural language queries to obtain network performance and Quality of Experience (QoE) insights easily. The introduction of new AI tools within Q is expected to elevate productivity levels and enhance operational processes for users.

news.headline: Michelle Obama and Craig Robinson will host the video podcast 'IMO' under Higher Ground. They'll interview celebs and share advice.
news.summary: Mrs. Obama, along with her brother Craig Robinson, will be conducting celebrity interviews and providing guidance on a range of subjects through their production company, Higher Ground.

news.headline: Global oil trading has peaked, says Jeff Currie from Carlyle, indicating a possible downturn in the industry.
Global Web Novel Market to hit USD 13,510M by 2030, driven by mobile adoption & new monetization models. Reached USD 10,500M in 2023.
news.summary: In March 10, 2025, in Bangalore, India, it was reported that the Web Novel Market is divided into types such as Subscription Based and Advertisement Based, with applications including Mobile Terminal and PC Terminal. The market had a value of approximately USD 10.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow to around USD 13.51 billion.

news.headline: Code and Theory named Ad Age B2B Agency of the Year for work with top brands like Amazon Ads and Qualcomm.
news.summary: A renowned technology and creative network has been acknowledged for its groundbreaking projects for major companies such as Amazon Ads, Qualcomm, Thomson Reuters, and Volvo Trucks. Code and Theory, a part of Stagwell (NASDAQ: STGW), was recently honored as the first-ever recipient of Ad Age's Business-to-Business award. The recognition highlights the exceptional work done by Code and Theory, further cementing its reputation in the industry as a leader in innovative marketing strategies.

news.headline: Maureen Downs wins Lifetime Achievement Award at Women in Technology and Data Awards in 2025 by WatersTechnology.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in London, Connamara Technologies, a prominent exchange technology provider, revealed that Maureen C. Downs, the co-founder and chair, received the "Trailblazer Lifetime Achievement Award (vendor)" from WatersTechnology at the Women in Technology and Data event.

news.headline: EQB Inc. (TSX: EQB) announces filing of management info circular and notice of annual shareholder meeting, to be held hybrid.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, EQB Inc. (TSX: EQB) released information about its upcoming annual meeting for common shareholders, along with the management information circular. The meeting will be hybrid, allowing both virtual participation and in-person attendance at 351 King Street. This update was shared widely without specifying the source.

news.headline: US push for stablecoin adoption may benefit Bitcoin as it emerges as potential reserve asset. Trump promises to maintain USD dominance. Tether to invest 15% of profits into Bitcoin, earning record $4.5B profit in Q1 2024. Magazine discusses Bitcoin's June highs and SOL's outflows.
news.summary: The US government is pushing for stablecoin adoption to maintain the dollar's global dominance, supporting Bitcoin as a potential federal reserve asset. US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent emphasized the importance of stablecoins in preserving the US dollar as the world's dominant reserve currency. President Trump signed an executive order establishing a Bitcoin reserve using confiscated cryptocurrency, indicating a shift in the government's stance on BTC. Tether, the largest stablecoin issuer, announced it would invest 15% of its net profit into Bitcoin, leading to significant gains for the company. Tether's Bitcoin holdings earned $5 billion in profits in 2024, contributing to its total $13 billion yearly profit. Legislative bills are awaiting approval to provide regulatory clarity for the US crypto industry. The US focus on financial dominance through stablecoin adoption may draw capital into Bitcoin investments, further solidifying its position as a store of value.

news.headline: ISG combines software and services research in a unique approach to guide digital transformation; first of its kind.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, business services provider ISG announced a unique initiative today merging its software and services research. This innovative approach aims to enhance the assessment of digital transformation partners. This move signifies a groundbreaking step by ISG in revolutionizing the evaluation process for potential partners in digital transformation.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index 20/100 = Extreme Fear
Fear & Greed Index: 16/100 = Extreme Fear
Leviathan Gold to offer 35M units at $0.10/unit to raise $3.5M in non-brokered private placement.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 10, 2025, Leviathan Gold Ltd. shared news of a non-brokered private placement. The company plans to offer up to 35,000,000 units at $0.10 per Unit, aiming to raise a total of $3,500,000 through this Offering. Leviathan is listed as LVX on the TSXV and 0GP on the Germany stock exchange. The private placement is a part of the Company's strategic financial initiatives.

news.headline: Progressive Corp declares $0.10 per common share dividend, payable on April 11, 2025, to shareholders of record on April 3.
news.summary: In Mayfield Village, Ohio, on March 7, 2025, The Progressive Corporation (NYSE: PGR) announced a dividend of $0.10 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on April 11, 2025, to shareholders recorded on April 3, 2025.

news.headline: Mexico's President Sheinbaum: We are to have a relationship of respect with Canada's Carney
James Franks joins WellBiz Brands as Senior VP of Franchise Growth to expand health brands globally.
news.summary: A seasoned expert in the franchise industry has been appointed to lead the growth of various health and wellness brands. On March 10, 2025, WellBiz Brands Inc., a top player in beauty and wellness franchising, revealed James Franks as its new Senior Vice President. Franks will be instrumental in steering expansion efforts across the company's diverse range of brands, signaling a significant move for the organization.

news.headline: Inventor from Rialto, Calif., creates Input Shaft Assembly Tool to aid diesel mechanics with clutch work.
news.summary: A resident of Rialto, California, who works as a diesel truck mechanic, shared his innovative creation of the Input Shaft Assembly Tool in Pittsburgh on March 10, 2025. The inventor discussed the challenges he faced with lifting and positioning assembled clutches, motivating him to develop this tool. The tool aims to simplify clutch work by assisting in the manipulation of these components. The invention is expected to revolutionize the process for mechanics working with diesel trucks, enhancing efficiency and potentially reducing the time required for such tasks.

news.headline: Battery swapping market to grow from $1.46B in 2025 to $22.72B by 2035 at 31.5% CAGR, per MarketsandMarkets.
news.summary: In DELRAY BEACH, Fla., on March 10, 2025, it was reported that the global battery swapping market is valued at approximately USD 1.46 billion in 2025 and is expected to soar to USD 22.72 billion by 2035. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 31.5% from 2025 to 2035, as outlined in a recent study by MarketsandMarkets. This highlights the rapid expansion and potential within the battery swapping industry.

news.headline: Possible new C-suite put joins Fed and Trump puts, impacting markets and stocks significantly.
NVISION Latino Film and Music Festival moving to Miami in 2025 after 10 years, now accepting submissions.
news.summary: A significant player in Latino culture is now establishing itself as a worldwide cultural center, highlighting Latino perspectives in cinema and music. Submissions have commenced for the NVISION Latino Film and Music Festival, following a decade of achievements in New York and Palm Springs. The festival is set to showcase the work of Latino creators on a global scale.

news.headline: Informa Connect thanks participants for successful HIMSS25 in Las Vegas, announces dates for HIMSS26.
news.summary: Las Vegas, March 10, 2025 - Informa Connect expresses sincere appreciation to everyone involved in making HIMSS25 a resounding success in Las Vegas from March 3 to 6. This healthcare technology conference, which occurs yearly, saw impressive numbers of attendees, exhibitors, sponsors, speakers, and staff contributing to its triumph.

news.headline: Cambium appoints Brett Schneider as Independent Board Director, effective March 1st, 2025, to enhance leadership.
news.summary: A company specializing in advanced materials innovation, Cambium, based in El Segundo, California, disclosed on March 10, 2025, the appointment of Brett Schneider as an Independent Board Director. This appointment, which became effective on March 1, 2025, aims to enhance Cambium's leadership team during a phase of expansion.

news.headline: AGM held by RealKredit Danmark A/S, announced annual earnings of $10 million with a revenue increase of 15%.
Comcast Business launches new brand campaign titled "Powering the Engine of Modern Business," with TV spots featuring Billy Horschel and others.
news.summary: In Philadelphia and Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida, Comcast Business has unveiled its latest multichannel brand campaign called “Powering the Engine of Modern Business.” This campaign showcases the company's role as a global enterprise technology partner. Launched recently, the campaign consists of three TV commercials showcasing real-life situations where Comcast Business has provided solutions for its clients. The commercials include appearances by notable figures such as golfers Billy Horschel and Tom Watson, as well as Golf Channel’s Rich Lerner. This campaign aims to highlight Comcast Business's prowess in serving businesses with their technological needs.

news.headline: Philips partners with Ingeborg Initiatives to provide Arkansas expectant parents with Philips Avent Pregnancy+ app for critical health resources, improving care and health habits.
news.summary: A partnership between Royal Philips and Ingeborg Initiatives aims to provide expectant parents in Arkansas with enhanced support through the Philips Avent Pregnancy+ app. In an effort to improve healthcare access and promote healthy habits, all state residents will have access to this app created specifically for them. By downloading the app, individuals will gain access to tailored resources and tools, contributing to increased access to care and improved health literacy. Royal Philips, a leader in health technology, and Ingeborg Initiatives are collaborating to ensure that expectant parents in Arkansas receive valuable support through this initiative.

news.headline: UniCourt introduced new docket tracking feature, offering real-time updates for 3,000+ courts, enhancing legal operations.
news.summary: In Tustin, California, UniCourt has introduced a new feature for tracking court dockets, offering the quickest and most precise real-time updates for more than 3,000 state and federal courts. This extensive coverage surpasses competitors in the industry. UniCourt's docket tracking feature is unmatched in its efficiency and accuracy, allowing law firms to enhance and automate their docketing processes. With this innovative tool, law firms can stay ahead by receiving immediate notifications of any new developments.

news.headline: S&P 500 expected to hit 7,000 by end of year, started strong in Jan with 3% increase, tariffs caused market shift in Feb.
news.summary: At the start of the year, the market showed strength, surging by over 3% in January due to optimism linked to Trump's presidency and market-oriented policies. This positive sentiment persisted into February until concerns over tariffs came to the forefront. Trump had initially set a February 1 deadline for imposing 25% tariffs on Mexico and Canada, but he later opted for a different agreement aimed at addressing the fentanyl crisis. Despite these announcements, the market overlooked these events and kept rising. However, on February 13, the mood changed as Trump's discussions...

Global media leaders closely monitoring China's "two sessions" for insights into 2025 roadmap. Key topics include economy and foreign policy.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Beijing, leaders and top editors of major media outlets worldwide are monitoring China's "two sessions" closely as it provides insight into the country's development plan for 2025. The event is crucial for understanding China's economic pathway.

news.headline: Stellar receives National Safety Pinnacle Award from ABC, presented at Excellence in Construction® Awards in Vegas on Feb 26.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida on March 10, 2025, Stellar was honored with a National Safety Pinnacle Award by Associated Builders and Contractors. The award was bestowed during the 35th annual Excellence in Construction® Awards at the ABC Convention 2025 in Las Vegas on February 26. Stellar, a...

news.headline: Guidefitter and IHEA partner to improve hunter education and engage new hunters, increasing hunting participation. BOZEMAN, Mont., March 10, 2025.
news.summary: Joining forces with top industry experts to promote and encourage greater participation in hunting and shooting sports, Guidefitter, a community and marketplace driven by insights from numerous professional guides and outdoor enthusiasts, is collaborating with leaders in the field. This initiative comes as Guidefitter's platform continues to grow, boasting input from thousands of experts. Located in Bozeman, Montana, this partnership was announced on March 10, 2025, as a step towards educating, equipping, and inspiring more individuals to engage in these activities.

news.headline: BioNTech reports Q4 profit of 1.08 euros/share, down from 1.88 euros last year. Sales at 1.19 billion euros.
news.summary: BioNTech SE announced a decrease in fourth-quarter earnings, with per-share earnings dropping to 1.08 euros ($1.17) from 1.88 euros compared to last year, missing the consensus of 38 cents. Despite the decline, the company reported sales of 1.19 billion euros, surpassing the expected 1.09 billion euros, although lower than the previous report of 1.48 billion euros. The drop in revenue was attributed to decreased demand for their COVID-19 vaccines. Collaborator Pfizer Inc's write-downs had a significant impact on BioNTech's gross profit share, further affecting revenue negatively.

news.headline: DeFi TVL plunges $45B since Trump's US election, dropping to $92.6B by March 10. Ethereum's net outflow hits $1.8B weekly amid price declines. Pectra upgrade faces issues in boosting layer 2 efficiency for Ethereum.
news.summary: The total value of cryptocurrencies locked in DeFi protocols has dropped from $138 billion to $92.6 billion since Donald Trump became US President in November 2024. Ethereum's TVL has decreased by $45 billion and its price has not surpassed its record high of $4,787 from November 2021. However, there has been a weekly net exchange outflow of nearly 800,000 Ether worth $1.8 billion, suggesting a strategic buying opportunity for holders. The upcoming Pectra upgrade for Ethereum aims to reduce congestion and gas fees, but has faced setbacks in its rollout on the Sepolia testnet due to errors and empty blocks being mined.

news.headline: German Finance Minister Kukies: Competitiveness and growth are required to gain needed fiscal space.
Quarterwave partners with RFMW to offer advanced antenna solutions for industries like Smart Farming and IoT.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, a significant partnership has been declared between Quarterwave UG and RFMW. Quarterwave UG, known for its innovative antenna solutions, has joined forces with RFMW, a reputable distributor of RF and microwave components. This collaboration aims to boost the exposure of Quarterwave’s state-of-the-art antenna designs in sectors such as Smart Farming, Industrial IoT, and telecommunications. With a wealth of experience in RF totaling over 40 years and boasting more than 50 patents along with 100 customized antenna designs, this partnership is set to make a substantial impact.

news.headline: Lessen partners with RealPage to enhance property operations, offering streamlined services for managers.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Lessen, a top tech-driven outsourced real estate property services provider, has revealed a new collaboration with RealPage, a prominent property management software firm. This integration will empower Lessen to offer more efficient on-demand services by linking with the Lessen360™ platform. The partnership ensures seamless connectivity for multifamily property managers, enhancing operational efficiency and flexibility. Lessen360™, a cloud-based platform, will now provide enhanced capabilities, benefiting a wide range of property managers.
